# pfsense_dynamic_dns_entries (Data Source)

Retrieves all [dynamic DNS](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/services/dyndns/index.html) client entries.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_dynamic_dns_entries" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `dynamic_dns_entries` (List of Object) List of dynamic DNS entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dynamic_dns_entries))

<a id="nestedatt--dynamic_dns_entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `dynamic_dns_entries`

Read-Only:

- `curl_ipresolve_v4` (Boolean)
- `curl_proxy` (String)
- `curl_ssl_verifypeer` (Boolean)
- `description` (String)
- `disabled` (Boolean)
- `domain_name` (String)
- `host` (String)
- `id` (Number)
- `interface` (String)
- `max_cache_age` (String)
- `mx` (String)
- `password` (String, Sensitive)
- `proxied` (Boolean)
- `request_interface` (String)
- `result_match` (String)
- `ttl` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `update_url` (String)
- `username` (String, Sensitive)
- `verbose_log` (Boolean)
- `wildcard` (Boolean)
- `zone_id` (String)
